printablePacketContentsSummary: The Zak packet is incomplete because the active rubric or disputed centroid materials are missing.
activeQuestionText: In Texas, a towing contractor orally agreed with several subcontractor towing companies that, for the five-year term of the contractor’s government towing contract, the subcontractors would provide towing and storage services and in return would receive a share of the work or related benefits. No signed writing was ever made. The contractor later argued that the arrangement could have ended sooner if the government towing program was terminated early. Is the agreement enforceable? Analyze.

activeRubricRows.title: Issue spotting + prioritization
activeRubricRows.description: Whether the answer identifies the dispositive issue early and prioritizes the controlling path before secondary issues.
activeRubricRows.naGuidance: Mark row A not applicable only if the question packet does not materially trigger this issue.

goldenContains: The answer should directly address issue spotting + prioritization.
goldenTarget.comparisonGuidance: Compare the centroid against row A as the evaluation lens.
